heading: Powers
label: 154706 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15470636:4002., , .Apr. 6, 1988Pub. L. 100–281, § 2102 Stat. 73The words “and subject to the laws of such State” are omitted as unnecessary.
